vocab.meaning: loay hoay sửa chữa hoặc lắp ráp các vật nhỏ
vocab.example: I used to spend every weekend tinkering with old electronic gadgets to see how they functioned.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng phong phú/sống động
vocab.example: Being a child with a vivid imagination, I was frequently engrossed in role-playing games with my siblings.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác đạt được thành tựu
vocab.example: Finishing a complex jigsaw puzzle gave me a profound sense of accomplishment that kept me hooked for years.
Pottery was my favorite hands-on activity, allowing me to get messy while being productive.

vocab.meaning: quên hết thời gian (do quá tập trung)
vocab.example: I would often lose track of time while buried in adventure novels, completely oblivious to the world around me.
My parents bought me a small violin to nurture a talent they thought I possessed in classical music.

vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi nhằm mục đích giải trí
vocab.example: Collecting rare postage stamps was a popular recreational pursuit among children in my neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: thuộc về xúc giác (thích chạm, nặn, cầm nắm)
vocab.example: I had a very tactile hobby; I loved sculpting miniature figures out of colorful clay.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn, xả hơi (sau khi học tập)
vocab.example: Drawing was my primary way to unwind after a long day of primary school lessons.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về mặt trí tuệ
vocab.example: Playing chess provided the intellectual stimulation I craved as a competitive and curious child.
